steps.title: Find the singular subject
steps.content: The subject of the sentence is "The allocation," which is singular. The verb must agree with that singular subject and fit the historical context after Ukraine's 1991 split.

steps.title: Reject plural verbs
steps.content: A is plural present tense. C is plural present perfect. D is plural past tense. All three fail to agree with the singular subject "allocation." A singular past-tense verb fits the subject and context. The answer is B.
